facts_proyecto_ficticio: The deploy command for project Aurora is: aurora ship --stage prod
The Aurora API gateway listens on port 7443
Aurora's primary database is called stormdb and runs PostgreSQL 16
The Aurora team lead is Ryn Castellanos
Aurora releases go out every second Thursday
The Aurora staging URL is https://staging.aurora-internal.dev
Aurora feature flags are managed with the tool called flagpole
The Aurora on-call rotation is documented in the runbook page RB-114
Aurora CI runs on the runner pool named borealis
